Class BoundWorld

java.lang.Object
com.shanebeestudios.skbee.api.bound.BoundWorld
public class BoundWorld extends Object
Represents a holder of BoundRegions for Worlds

    • getRegionAtLocation

      @Nullable public @Nullable BoundRegion getRegionAtLocation(Location location)
      Get a region at a location
      Parameters:
      location - Location to check for region
      Returns:
      BoundRegion if available, else null

    • getOrCreateRegionAtLocation

      @NotNull public @NotNull BoundRegion getOrCreateRegionAtLocation(Location location)
      Get a region at a location
      Will create a region if one does not yet exist
      Parameters:
      location - Location to check for region
      Returns:
      BoundRegion if available or a new one

    • addBoundToRegion

      public void addBoundToRegion(Bound bound)
      Add a bound to a region
      Parameters:
      bound - Bound to add to region

    • removeBoundFromRegion

      public void removeBoundFromRegion(Bound bound)
      Remove a bound from a region
      If the region is empty after removal, the region will be deleted
      Parameters:
      bound - Bound to remove
